title: Junior Revenue Manager at Devyani International Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Devyani International Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Devyani International Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Devyani International Holdings Services:
Devyani International Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Devyani International Holdings Services!
